# Flicking

> A reliable, flexible, and extendable carousel library used by 30+ million people daily. Supports multiple frameworks (React, Vue3, Angular, Svelte, Preact) with circular mode, SSR, and rich customization.

Flicking is a production-ready carousel/slider with comprehensive API, event system, and framework integrations. This documentation covers installation, usage guides, complete API reference, and interactive examples.

## Getting Started

- [Quick Start](/guide/quickstart) - Installation and basic setup for JavaScript, React, Vue3
- [HTML Structure & Styling](/guide/structure-and-styling) - Required DOM structure and CSS classes
- [Controlling Flicking](/guide/controlling-flicking) - Methods for programmatic carousel control

## Framework Guides

- [React Guide](/guide/react-guide) - React integration, hooks, and component patterns
- [Vue3 Guide](/guide/vue3-guide) - Vue3 integration with Composition API

## API Essentials

The most important API references you need to work with Flicking:

- [Flicking](/api/classes/Flicking) - Main carousel class with all properties and methods
- [FlickingOptions](/api/interfaces/FlickingOptions) - Configuration options with demo links for each option
- [FlickingErrors](/api/interfaces/FlickingErrors) - Error types and handling
- [FlickingEvents](/api/interfaces/FlickingEvents) - Event system reference

## Demos

*Note: Interactive demo section is under active development*

- [Alignment](/demos/basic/alignment) - Panel alignment demonstrations
- [Circular Mode](/demos/basic/circular) - Infinite loop examples
- [Movement Types](/demos/basic/movement-types) - Snap vs free-scroll behaviors

## Optional

### Advanced API Reference

Detailed API documentation for advanced usage and internal components:

**Core Classes:**
- [Panel](/api/classes/Panel) - Individual slide/panel representation
- [Camera](/api/classes/Camera) - Viewport and positioning system
- [Control](/api/classes/Control) - Base input control system
- [FreeControl](/api/classes/FreeControl) - Free-scroll control mode
- [SnapControl](/api/classes/SnapControl) - Snap control mode
- [StrictControl](/api/classes/StrictControl) - Strict control mode
- [BoundCameraMode](/api/classes/BoundCameraMode) - Bounded camera movement
- [CircularCameraMode](/api/classes/CircularCameraMode) - Infinite circular/loop mode
- [LinearCameraMode](/api/classes/LinearCameraMode) - Standard linear movement
- [CrossFlicking](/api/classes/CrossFlicking) - Multi-dimensional carousel
- [FlickingError](/api/classes/FlickingError) - Error handling and codes
- [Viewport](/api/classes/Viewport) - Viewport management
- [Renderer](/api/classes/Renderer) - Rendering system
- [VirtualManager](/api/classes/VirtualManager) - Virtual scrolling manager

**Events:**
- [ChangedEvent](/api/interfaces/ChangedEvent) - Panel change event
- [MoveStartEvent](/api/interfaces/MoveStartEvent) - Movement start event
- [MoveEndEvent](/api/interfaces/MoveEndEvent) - Movement end event
- [MoveEvent](/api/interfaces/MoveEvent) - Movement progress event
- [HoldStartEvent](/api/interfaces/HoldStartEvent) - User interaction start
- [HoldEndEvent](/api/interfaces/HoldEndEvent) - User interaction end
- [WillChangeEvent](/api/interfaces/WillChangeEvent) - Before panel change
- [ReadyEvent](/api/types/ReadyEvent) - Initialization complete

**Configuration:**
- [CrossFlickingOptions](/api/interfaces/CrossFlickingOptions) - CrossFlicking configuration
- [PanelOptions](/api/interfaces/PanelOptions) - Panel-specific options
- [CameraOptions](/api/interfaces/CameraOptions) - Camera configuration
- [FreeControlOptions](/api/interfaces/FreeControlOptions) - Free control options
- [SnapControlOptions](/api/interfaces/SnapControlOptions) - Snap control options
- [StrictControlOptions](/api/interfaces/StrictControlOptions) - Strict control options
- [VirtualOptions](/api/interfaces/VirtualOptions) - Virtual scrolling options

**TypeScript Types:**
- [ElementLike](/api/types/ElementLike) - Element type definitions
- [MoveTypeOptions](/api/types/MoveTypeOptions) - Movement behavior types
- [FlickingReactiveObject](/api/types/FlickingReactiveObject) - Reactive API object type
- [InitializationErrors](/api/types/InitializationErrors) - Initialization error codes
- [MovementErrors](/api/types/MovementErrors) - Movement error codes
- [DOMManipulationErrors](/api/types/DOMManipulationErrors) - DOM operation errors
- [AnimationUpdateErrors](/api/types/AnimationUpdateErrors) - Animation error codes

**Utility Functions:**
- [connectFlickingReactiveAPI](/api/functions/connectFlickingReactiveAPI) - Connect reactive API adapter
- [getElement](/api/functions/getElement) - Element retrieval utility
- [getElementSize](/api/functions/getElementSize) - Element dimension calculation
- [parseAlign](/api/functions/parseAlign) - Parse alignment values
- [parseBounce](/api/functions/parseBounce) - Parse bounce configuration
- [parseCSSSizeValue](/api/functions/parseCSSSizeValue) - Parse CSS size strings
- [clamp](/api/functions/clamp) - Clamp value between min/max
- [circulateIndex](/api/functions/circulateIndex) - Circular index calculation
- [circulatePosition](/api/functions/circulatePosition) - Circular position calculation

**Constants:**
- [ALIGN](/api/variables/ALIGN) - Alignment constants (PREV, CENTER, NEXT)
- [DIRECTION](/api/variables/DIRECTION) - Direction constants (PREV, NEXT)
- [MOVE_TYPE](/api/variables/MOVE_TYPE) - Movement types (SNAP, FREE_SCROLL)
- [MOVE_DIRECTION](/api/variables/MOVE_DIRECTION) - Movement direction tracking
- [CLASS](/api/variables/CLASS) - CSS class name constants
- [CODE](/api/variables/CODE) - Error code constants
- [EVENTS](/api/variables/EVENTS) - Event name constants
- [ORDER](/api/variables/ORDER) - Panel ordering constants
- [CIRCULAR_FALLBACK](/api/variables/CIRCULAR_FALLBACK) - Circular fallback behavior

**Reactive Integration:**
- [FlickingReactiveData](/api/interfaces/FlickingReactiveData) - Reactive state data interface
- [FlickingReactiveMethod](/api/interfaces/FlickingReactiveMethod) - Reactive methods interface
- [FlickingReactiveState](/api/interfaces/FlickingReactiveState) - Reactive state interface
- [FlickingReactiveAPIOptions](/api/interfaces/FlickingReactiveAPIOptions) - Reactive API options
- [flickingReactiveAPIAdapter](/api/variables/flickingReactiveAPIAdapter) - Default reactive adapter

### Resources and Packages

Additional resources and package information

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/naver/egjs-flicking) - Source code, issues, contributions
- [NPM Package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@egjs/flicking) - Core library
- [Flicking Plugins](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@egjs/flicking-plugins) - Autoplay, Fade, Parallax effects

**Framework Packages:**
- [@egjs/react-flicking](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@egjs/react-flicking) - React wrapper
- [@egjs/vue3-flicking](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@egjs/vue3-flicking) - Vue3 wrapper

**Browser Support:** Modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge), IE11+ with polyfills, Mobile (iOS 7+, Android 4+)
